title: Model Training & Tuning
description: Training custom models and tuning foundation models
content: Vertex AI supports custom training using pre-built containers or custom Docker images. For foundation models, parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) and Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) are supported. Training pipelines can be orchestrated using Vertex AI Pipelines.

key_facts.definition: Train models with own code and containers
